zh.Dingle, County Kerry, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 克里丁格爾
愛爾蘭庫迪 克里丁格爾
zh.Fermoy, County Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克費爾莫易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Ellen Roche於大約1465年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克費爾莫易時，她的父親Maurice Roche26歲，母親Joan Fitzgerald-8歲。她於1484年與Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克費爾莫易結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里丁格爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.Dingle, County Kerry, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 克里丁格爾
爱尔兰庫迪 克里丁格爾
zh-hans.Fermoy, County Cork, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 科克費爾莫易
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Ellen Roche于大约1465年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克費爾莫易时，她的父亲Maurice Roche26岁，母亲Joan Fitzgerald-8岁。她于1484年与Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond在爱尔兰庫迪 科克費爾莫易结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在爱尔兰庫迪 克里丁格爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

variants.name: Laroche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Normand, Pierre, Jacques, Laurent, Adrien, Cecile, Germain, Marcel.
French:
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Laroche or La Roche, from Old French roche ‘rock’, with feminine definite article la.

variants.name: Larocque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Marcel, Normand, Valmore, Yves, Achille, Amie, Donat, Emile.

French: habitational name from La Ro(c)que, the name of several places in various parts of France, from a regional variant of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche , compare Laroche ), with feminine definite article la. Compare Laroque .

Altered form of southern French Roquebrune or of its variant Rocquebrune: habitational name from Ro(c)quebrune, the name of several places in the southern part of France. The surname Roquebrune is rare in France, while the variant Rocquebrune is extinct there. Compare Larock , Lerocque , Rockburn , and Rocque 1.

variants.name: Rochet
meanings: French: diminutive of   Roche  , a topographic name meaning ‘rock’, or a habitational name from (Le) Rochet, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Catalan: of French origin (see above). This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic and Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Rochat
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Philippe, Pierre.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of Old French roche ‘rock’ (see Roche 2), or a habitational name from Le Rochat, the name of several places in the eastern part of France.

variants.name: Roach
meanings: English:

of Norman origin, from Old French and Middle English roche ‘rock, cliff, promontory’, sometimes a translation of Stone . The surname may have been topographic, denoting someone who lived on or by a prominent rock or rocky place, or a habitational name for someone who lived or came from a place so named, such as one of those called Roque or Roche(s) in Normandy and neighboring regions, or Roche in Cornwall, Roach Farm in Clyst Hydon (Devon), or Roch in Pembrokeshire (see Roch ).

in Lancashire perhaps referring to the River Roch, which runs through Rochdale; the river name is probably a back-formation from Recedham, an early name for Rochdale recorded in 1086, derived from Old English reced ‘building, house, hall’ + hām ‘village, homestead’. Alternatively, the Lancashire name could be a shortened form of the now rare or extinct surname Rochdale alias Rachedale, Rachdall, a habitational name from Rochdale (Lancashire). From the 18th century onward the name is difficult to distinguish from Roch , borne by Irish migrants to South Lancashire, especially Liverpool.

variants.name: Roquet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Camille.
French: topographic name from a diminutive of roche ‘rock’ (see Roche and Roque ), or a habitational name from (Le) Roquet, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Rochez
meanings: Walloon and French: variant of   Roche   2 or   Rocher  .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Ellen Roche was born about 1465, in Fermoy, County Cork, Ireland, her father, Maurice Roche, was 26 and her mother, Joan Fitzgerald, was -8. She married Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond in 1484, in Fermoy, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1510, in Dingle, County Kerry, Ireland, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Ellen Roche est née environ 1465, à Fermoy, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Maurice Roche, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitzgerald, avait -8 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond en 1484, à Fermoy, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Dingle, County Kerry, Irlande, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Ellen Roche um 1465 in Fermoy, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maurice Roche 26 und ihre Mutter Joan Fitzgerald -8. Sie hat 1484 in Fermoy, County Cork, Irland Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Dingle, County Kerry, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ellen Roche è nata il circa 1465 nel Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, Maurice Roche, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan Fitzgerald, aveva -8 anni. Lei sposato Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond nel 1484, nel Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1510, nel Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ellen Rocheが約1465年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクフエルモイで生まれた時，父Maurice Rocheは26歳，母Joan Fitzgeraldは-8歳であった。1484年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクフエルモイでMaurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーディングルで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ellen Roche(이)가 대략 1465년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 퍼모이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maurice Roche(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fitzgerald(은)는 -8세였다. 그녀는 1484년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 퍼모이에서 Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 아일랜드 카운티 케리 딩글에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ellen Roche nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Maurice Roche, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitzgerald, tinha -8 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond em 1484, em Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Ellen Roche родилась около 1465 г. в местности фирмои, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Maurice Roche было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitzgerald, -8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond в 1484 г. в местности фирмои, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности дингл, коунти кирри, Ирландия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Ellen Roche nació aproximadamente 1465, en Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Maurice Roche, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Fitzgerald, tenía -8 años. Se casó con Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond en 1484, en Fermoy, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1510, en Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, a la edad de 46 años.
